title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - Unfinished landing closure is still visible in the verification/docs pathing: [apps/happy-web/README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/README.md), [apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh), [apps/happy-web/tests/test-state-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-state-contract.sh), [apps/happy-web/tests/test-design-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-design-contract.sh), [apps/happy-web/tests/test-pwa-shell.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-pwa-shell.sh), [apps/happy-web/tests/test-behavior-contract.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-behavior-contract.js), [apps/happy-web/tests/test-event-store-compaction.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-event-store-compaction.js), and [tests/test-kernel-context-governor.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/tests/test-kernel-context-governor.sh); they still hard-code the source-tree path, so the worktree can false-pass or read the wrong tree. -
